Sibghatullah Laghari

Sibghatullah Laghari

Backend Engineer · Java · Spring Boot · REST APIs

siblaghari@gmail.com · Sindh, Pakistan · GitHub · LinkedIn

Summary

Backend engineer who builds secure REST APIs, authentication systems, and database-driven services with Java and Spring Boot. Focused on layered architecture, RBAC, and shipping software that solves real problems. Open to internships, full-time, and freelance work.

Experience

Backend Engineer Aug 2024 — Present

Freelance · Independent Projects

  • Architect REST APIs with clear resource models, consistent error handling, and role-protected endpoints
  • Implement JWT authentication, BCrypt hashing, and RBAC with Spring Security filter chains
  • Design normalized MySQL schemas and map entities with JPA/Hibernate for query-efficient data access
  • Structure services using Controller → Service → Repository layering with DTOs and separation of concerns
BE Software Engineering 2024 — Present

Mehran University of Engineering & Technology

  • Implement data structures and algorithms in Java with focus on practical problem solving
  • Design relational databases — normalization, SQL queries, and schema-to-entity mapping
  • Apply OOP, design patterns, and SOLID principles in layered backend codebases
  • Collaborate on team projects using Git workflows, code reviews, and Agile practices

Education

BE Software Engineering 2024 — Present

Mehran University of Engineering & Technology

4th Semester Completed · CGPA 3.8

Key Projects

CCTRS — Carbon Contribution & Reward Tracking System

End-to-end backend system demonstrating authentication, RBAC, and business logic in a real tracking domain.

MediConnect — Healthcare Backend API Platform

Demonstrates ability to deliver a complete backend platform: API design, security, and database architecture without relying on UI screenshots.

ULSM — User Login & Service Management API

Reusable auth foundation applicable to any product needing secure user management and RBAC.

Technical Skills

Core Backend: Java, Spring Boot, Spring Security, REST APIs, JPA, Hibernate, MySQL
Authentication & Security: JWT, RBAC, OAuth2, BCrypt
Tools: Git, GitHub, Maven, Postman, Linux
Currently Exploring: Docker, Microservices, Cloud, System Design, Open Source
